serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/catalogservice
serverInfo.title: catalogservice
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the catalogservice service.

tools.name: get_metadata_catalogservice
tools.title: get_metadata_catalogservice
tools.description:
Get metadata of the OData service with optional filtering to reduce token consumption.
Returns the metadata in XML format, which can be used to discover available entities and their properties.
Call this endpoint every time before you call other tools to ensure understanding of the schema.
Based on the metadata, you can dynamically create an OData request.

Use filtering parameters to get specific metadata sections. Without parameters, this tool returns the complete XML metadata (which might be huge).
Only use the specified enum values for the filtering parameters.

tools.name: batch_for_catalogservice
tools.title: batch_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Execute multiple OData operations in a single batch request using the $batch endpoint. This allows you to combine multiple tool calls into one HTTP request, improving efficiency when performing multiple operations.

tools.name: list_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.title: list_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Retrieve a list of entities from the spaces collection in the catalogservice service. Supports OData query options for filtering, sorting, ranking ($top), skipping ($skip), expanding related entities, counting, selecting specific properties. Only use attributes in the query options that are specified in the metadata. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: get_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.title: get_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Retrieve a single entity by its key from the spaces collection in the catalogservice service. Provide the key property value(s) to identify the specific entity to retrieve. Supports OData query options for selecting specific properties ($select), expanding related entities ($expand). If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: count_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.title: count_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Get the total count of entities in the spaces collection in the catalogservice service. Supports OData $filter to count only entities matching specific criteria. Use this when you need to determine the total number of entities without retrieving the actual data. If you need to understand the available filter properties, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: list_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.title: list_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Retrieve a list of entities from the assets collection in the catalogservice service. Supports OData query options for filtering, sorting, ranking ($top), skipping ($skip), expanding related entities, counting, selecting specific properties. Only use attributes in the query options that are specified in the metadata. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: get_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.title: get_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Retrieve a single entity by its key from the assets collection in the catalogservice service. Provide the key property value(s) to identify the specific entity to retrieve. Supports OData query options for selecting specific properties ($select), expanding related entities ($expand). If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: count_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.title: count_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Get the total count of entities in the assets collection in the catalogservice service. Supports OData $filter to count only entities matching specific criteria. Use this when you need to determine the total number of entities without retrieving the actual data. If you need to understand the available filter properties, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: list_assets_in_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.title: list_assets_in_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Navigate from spaces to related assets entities via the 'assets' navigation property. Supports OData query options for filtering, sorting, paging, expanding, counting, and selecting specific properties. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: count_assets_in_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.title: count_assets_in_spaces_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Count assets entities accessible via the 'assets' navigation property of spaces in the catalogservice service. Returns the total number of matching entities.

tools.name: get_space_in_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.title: get_space_in_assets_for_catalogservice
tools.description: Navigate from assets to the related spaces entity via the 'space' navigation property. Supports $select and $expand query options. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_catalogservice tool first to get the metadata.
